roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S ADD TO CAL -MOT VAC SENT/MOT TO ISSUE NEW SENT FILED
DEFT'S ADD TO CAL- ADV FROM 6-19 & VACATE/DISPO FILED

/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE SENTENCE/DAWT/X:MOTION TO VACATE SENTENCE PREVIOUSLY ISSUED ON 6-12-2014 IS GRANTED,/X: COURT ISSUES A NEW SENTENCE:/PAJ:120 DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 60 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: VIOLATION#2 - ABSCONDING IS DISMISSED,/X: COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO REINSTATE PAROLE AS OF 2-25-2014 WITHOUT ANY TIME LOSS,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:120 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR49  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MUST PARTICIPATE IN THE PHATT CHANCE RECOVERYPROGRAM AS A CONDITION OF PAROLE,PAROLE WAS SUSPENDED ON 2-25-2014,PAROLE IS REINSTATED ON 4-25-2014,COURT SIGNS ORDER RELEASING HIM TO THE AGENTS - STAFF OF THE DIVISION OF ADULT PAROLE,VACATE 6-19-2014 COURT DATE,/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS AND THE COURT FINDS PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/CONTD:STATUSOF STAY AND TRANSFER/
